mapper.select: SELECT * FROM check_items WHERE deleted = 0 AND category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM check_items WHERE deleted = 0 AND item_code = #{itemCode} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM check_items WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY category_id ASC, sort_order ASC
SELECT * FROM check_items WHERE deleted = 0 AND category_id = #{categoryId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO check_items ( id, category_id, item_code, item_name, item_description, deduct_mode, default_deduct_score, min_deduct_score, max_deduct_score, check_points, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.categoryId}, #{item.itemCode}, #{item.itemName}, #{item.itemDescription}, #{item.deductMode}, #{item.defaultDeductScore}, #{item.minDeductScore}, #{item.maxDeductScore}, #{item.checkPoints}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.status}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE check_items SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND deleted = 0
